programmes.show_description: Will's Birthday: Will plans a suitably grown-up dinner to celebrate his birthday, but his event clashes with a far more popular party, leaving his friends with a dilemma.
Night Out in London: Will decides that the lads should be 'the boys who go to clubs'. They head to the West End, meeting aggressive bouncers and angry bus passengers.
Brand new series: Two new couples join the experiment. But when big personalities clash, the marriages threaten to unravel before the honeymoons have even begun...
Brand new series: Vicky and her husband Ercan face a big decision; should they start a family? Vicky gives motherhood a trial run and sees how her frozen embryos are getting on. (Ep1/2)
Dave Kim's Party: With Dave Kim's parents out of town for the weekend, Adam decides to throw a giant party to impress Brea.
Body Swap: Adam is thrilled about William Penn's new open lunch policy. And Geoff gets more than he bargained for when he uses Barry's student ID.
The One with All the Pigs: Billy believes the sty's the limit as he plans a pig-themed wedding involving a world-record parade of porkers. Will bride Steph kick up a stink at Billy's plans?
Can Warren trust Jenson? Diane makes a decision as her family struggle with her prognosis. And a resident is forced to reveal the truth.
With things looking up, Donny proposes to Misbah, but it's not long before their bubble bursts... Elsewhere, Cleo struggles to re-adjust to life at home, and a relationship is on the rocks.
A short, cheeky clip from Rude Tube's naughty little sister Rude(ish) Tube, featuring sheep.
Zocalo: Gordon Ramsay visits a floundering Mexican restaurant which has become an albatross around the necks of its owners, married couple Greg and Mary Russell.
A Fish Story: After Geoff vows to rekindle Erica's interest in music, she auditions for a campus a cappella group. Beverly forces Adam and Murray to go camping.
Schmoopie's Big Adventure: When Adam's birthday arrives, Beverly takes drastic measures to keep him from growing up too fast.
Benched: When Luke and Manny's hot-tempered basketball coach quits in the middle of a game, Jay and Phil both jockey to fill the position.
Travels with Scout: When Phil's dad turns up in a mobile home with a little four-legged friend, Claire thinks he might be hiding an ulterior motive for his visit.
Brand new series: Two new couples join the experiment. But when big personalities clash, the marriages threaten to unravel before the honeymoons have even begun...
Medical student Alice dates Max, the self-styled 'Wolf of Wallington High Street'. Veteran house music groover Mark meets Alison, a call centre worker by day and raver by night.
Spin a Yarn: Gordon tries to save the struggling Spin a Yarn restaurant in California. Despite an expensive refurbishment, the business is tearing apart its owners' marriage.
Simpson Tide: Homer, Barney and Moe become trapped in a nuclear submarine in a combat situation. Then Homer accidentally ejects the captain (guest star Rod Steiger).
Gone Abie Gone: Grampa goes missing. Can Homer and Marge find him by following clues from when he used to work in a restaurant?
Halloween: Claire, who loves Halloween, ropes in the whole family to spookify the Dunphy house, but none of it goes quite to plan.
Chirp: Claire and Haley have a bit of quality girl time while they're stuck at home sick. Phil is preoccupied by the taunts of a chirping smoke detector.
Brand new series: Two new couples join the experiment. But when big personalities clash, the marriages threaten to unravel before the honeymoons have even begun...

programmes.show_name: New: Dance Moms: A New Era
programmes.show_description: Brand new series - Living on a Prayer: Glo selects new girl Miah to lead the group dance. And meddlesome mom Jing has a plan to force her own daughter into another girl's solo.
Hardly Kirk-ing: Bart and Milhouse explore the perks of adulthood when a hair-shaving experiment leaves Milhouse looking exactly like his dad Kirk.
Gorgeous Grampa: The family discover that Grampa used to be a top wrestler. And Mr Burns - a big fan - convinces him to get back in the ring...
Froggy supports his grandson. Donny visits a former flame. And a mother is horrified by what she overhears...
...Australia - Brand new series: The two new couples go on honeymoon, where there's an unlikely third wheel and frank confessions, and a groom's views infuriate his new wife.
Brand new series: Vicky and Ercan meet a mum who had her children through surrogacy and an adoptive mum. But are they any closer to deciding whether parenthood is right for them? (Ep2/2)
The Goggleboxers watch Wheel of Fortune, Trigger Point, Love Is Blind, Boarders, Michael McIntyre's Big Show and more.
Eccentric student Louisa, who went to an all-girls boarding school and says she can't flirt, meets Will, who was once the 'token fat child' but lost weight and gained confidence.
Two more hopeful singletons join Anna Richardson in the Naked Attraction studio, including martial arts instructor Ryan, who was born with cystic fibrosis.
Brand new series: The two new couples go on honeymoon, where there's an unlikely third wheel and frank confessions, and a groom's views infuriate his new wife.
Brand new series: Vicky and Ercan meet a mum who had her children through surrogacy and an adoptive mum. But are they any closer to deciding whether parenthood is right for them? (Ep2/2)
A Fish Story: After Geoff vows to rekindle Erica's interest in music, she auditions for a campus a cappella group. Beverly forces Adam and Murray to go camping.
Schmoopie's Big Adventure: When Adam's birthday arrives, Beverly takes drastic measures to keep him from growing up too fast.
The Aussie Soap One: Australia-born Adam is taking a risk planning an '80s Aussie soap' wedding when his bride-to-be Rachel is hoping for something classy and sophisticated...
The Last Halloween: Phil's determined to scare Claire on Halloween. And for the first time, Gloria is self-conscious about her age when someone correctly assumes she's Jay's wife.
A Game of Chicken: Gloria tries to secretly baptise the twins before Haley and Dylan get home. Cam is at war with his school's mascot. Claire deals with the closet fiasco fallout.
A short, cheeky clip from Rude Tube's naughty little sister, Rude(ish) Tube, featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorbike and bicycle variety.
Spin a Yarn: Gordon tries to save the struggling Spin a Yarn restaurant in California. Despite an expensive refurbishment, the business is tearing apart its owners' marriage.
Island Time: For spring break, Barry talks Erica, Ren and the JTP into a discount vacation. Beverly worries when Adam considers taking time off after school.
The Return of the Formica King: Murray's nemesis 'Formica' Mike tries to buy Ottoman Empire.
Airport 2010: For Jay's birthday, Gloria surprises him with a getaway to Hawaii - but she's invited the whole family. And there's no greater test than travelling with the family.
Hawaii: A relaxing family vacation in Hawaii gets slightly derailed when everyone has their own ideas of fun.
Brand new series: The two new couples go on honeymoon, where there's an unlikely third wheel and frank confessions, and a groom's views infuriate his new wife.
Rude Tube's naughty little sister presents a man pretending to be a walrus, an incredible downhill bike run and some computer keyboard hurling.
Looking for a love match this time are a self-proclaimed 'man-eater', a urologist whose job can scare off men, and a single mum seeking a guy who can accept that she has a child.
Charlie's: Gordon Ramsay visits Italian bistro Charlie's, where the pasta's soggy, the lasagne's a liability and the chef can't even cook a meatball.
Penny-Wiseguys: When mobster Fat Tony has to do jury service, he puts mild-mannered accountant Dan Gillick (voiced by Steve Carell) in charge of his criminal organisation.
A Tree Grows in Springfield: Homer becomes addicted to a tablet that Lisa wins for him in the school's silent auction, but he's distraught when it gets broken.
Manny Get Your Gun: Everyone gathers at a restaurant to celebrate Manny's birthday, although Manny himself is experiencing a mini-life crisis about getting older.
Brand new series: The two new couples go on honeymoon, where there's an unlikely third wheel and frank confessions, and a groom's views infuriate his new wife.

programmes.show_name: New: Dance Moms: A New Era
programmes.show_description: Brand new series - Audrey's Last Dance?: This time the momma drama is between Coach Glo and her assistant - and daughter - Kaeli, when tensions boil over due to one dancer's exit.
Black-Eyed, Please: Flanders loses his cool when his laid-back parents start to prefer Homer's company to his own. Lisa is bullied by her new substitute teacher (Tina Fey).
Dark Knight Court: When Bart's accused of playing a prank on the school marching band - a prank he says he didn't commit - Lisa must step in to defend her brother in court.
The Longest Marge: Somehow, Marge and Mr Burns end up co-parenting the Springfield Atoms' new wayward star quarterback.
...Australia - Brand new series: Three new couples prepare for their first dinner party. But after the tension and strife of the last one, the atmosphere is far from welcoming.
...Dinner Party - Brand new series: Bec, Tyson and Rebecca have entered the chat, to talk about Bec's explosive dinner party behaviour, Tyson's controversial views and more. (Ep2)
The Goggleboxers have been watching: One Day, Married at First Sight Australia, The Apprentice, Boarders, The Rescue and more.
When stunning Sasha is stood up, an unexpected knight in shining armour steps in: waiter Sam. Debbie's been married twice, but now says she's 'in the infancy of lesbianism'.
